q: Did you have a favorite teacher when you were at school?
examiner_note:
Câu hỏi này về trải nghiệm cá nhân và kỷ niệm. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Kể về một giáo viên cụ thể. Mô tả phẩm chất của họ (tận tâm, hài hước, dạy giỏi) và sức ảnh hưởng của họ đối với bạn. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'stand out in my mind', 'passionate about their subject', 'encouraging', 'patient', 'had a knack for', 'made a lasting impression'.

band7.text: Yes, I had a favorite teacher, my English teacher in high school. She was very kind and always encouraged us to speak more in class. Her lessons were very interesting because she used many games and videos, which made learning fun.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, mô tả phẩm chất giáo viên bằng từ ngữ đơn giản nhưng hiệu quả. Ngữ pháp ổn định.

band8.text: My history teacher really stands out in my mind. He was incredibly passionate about his subject and had a knack for making even the most boring periods come alive with stories. He was also very supportive and always had time for students who were struggling.
band8.note: Sử dụng các cụm từ hay như 'stands out in my mind', 'passionate about', 'had a knack for', 'come alive'. Diễn đạt mượt mà.

band9.text: The one teacher who made a truly lasting impression on me was my mathematics instructor. She possessed a rare combination of academic brilliance and immense patience. Beyond just teaching formulas, she taught us how to approach problems logically and persevere through challenges, which has been invaluable to me.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng cực kỳ ấn tượng ('lasting impression', 'academic brilliance', 'immense patience', 'persevere', 'invaluable'). Lập luận sâu sắc về sức ảnh hưởng của giáo viên.

v.meaning: nổi bật trong tâm trí/đáng nhớ
v.example: The trip to the mountains really stands out in my mind as one of the best times of my life.
She is very passionate about social justice and human rights.

v.meaning: có năng khiếu/biết cách làm gì đó khéo léo
v.example: My grandfather had a knack for growing beautiful roses.
Her speech on environmental conservation made a lasting impression on everyone.

v.meaning: sự xuất sắc/tỏa sáng trong học thuật
v.example: The young scientist's academic brilliance was recognized internationally.
Teaching young children requires a great deal of immense patience.
Despite many setbacks, the team continued to persevere and eventually won the title.
Her advice was invaluable to me during the decision-making process.
The city really comes alive after dark with all the lights and music.
The teacher gave the students some encouraging words before the big exam.
I was lucky to have a very supportive family who believed in me.
My high school biology teacher was an inspiring figure who led me to study medicine.
Parents should strive to be positive role models for their children.
The university has a mentoring program to help new students adjust to campus life.
The careers advisor provided valuable guidance on job applications.
She has a real knack for making people feel comfortable and at ease.
The leader's charisma helped to inspire confidence in his team.
Achieving success requires a lot of hard work and dedication.
The students' enthusiasm for the project was truly infectious.
Despite his high position, he is always very friendly and approachable.
The rules at the school are very strict, but they are fair.
Our manager is known for being very fair-minded and objective.
The guide was incredibly knowledgeable about the history of the ancient city.

v.meaning: có khả năng diễn đạt lưu loát
v.example: She is a very articulate and persuasive speaker.
The novel was so engaging that I finished it in one day.
Our science teacher is very humorous and always makes us laugh.
The nurse patiently explained the procedure to the nervous patient.
She is a very kind and compassionate person who always helps those in need.
It was very thoughtful of you to remember my birthday.
He is one of the most influential people in the technology industry.
The new law will have a significant impact on local businesses.
Winning the competition was a major turning point in her artistic career.
Reading this book was a perspective-shifting experience for me.
The elder in the village is respected for his great wisdom and experience.
College is a time for significant intellectual and personal growth.
She has mentored many young designers during her career.
The school provides an environment that nurtures creativity and innovation.
Parents should encourage their children to explore different interests.
The community center aims to empower local residents through skill-building workshops.
The university values students who have a well-rounded academic and extracurricular background.
Graduating from university with honors is a major achievement.
The scientist received international recognition for her groundbreaking research.
The students showed their appreciation for the teacher with a beautiful card and flowers.
I would like to express my sincere gratitude for all your support.
It's important to treat everyone with respect, regardless of their position.
The teacher's legacy lives on in the lives of the thousands of students she inspired.
The coach's role is to foster teamwork and sportsmanship among the players.
Reading stories is a great way to stimulate a child's imagination.
The film sparked a debate that ignited passions on both sides of the issue.
If you follow your passion, success will naturally follow.
